title: DP Training Audit Log
description: Schema for the privacy-budget audit log produced by dp-llm-training/budget_accountant.py. Each log documents cumulative privacy expenditure (epsilon, delta) per training epoch, enabling post-hoc governance review without re-running training. Aligned with NIST AI RMF GOVERN-1.7 (continuous monitoring) and GOVERN-1.4 (audit trail persistence).

metadata.description: Training-run hyperparameters fixed before the run begins.

target_epsilon.description: Maximum acceptable privacy loss (epsilon). Training halts if epsilon_spent exceeds this value.

target_delta.description: Failure-probability bound (delta). Should be much smaller than 1/n.

noise_multiplier.description: Ratio of Gaussian noise standard deviation to per-sample gradient clipping threshold.

sample_rate.description: Batch size divided by dataset size. Must be in (0, 1].

log.description: Ordered list of per-epoch audit records. Must have at least one entry.

epoch_record.description: Audit record for one completed training epoch.

cumulative_steps.description: Total gradient update steps completed up to and including this epoch.

epsilon_spent.description: Cumulative epsilon consumed through this epoch (RDP accountant estimate).

delta.description: Delta value used for this epoch epsilon computation. Should equal metadata.target_delta.

loss.description: Average training loss for this epoch.
